ddt:Target.Name: Tdb_X62_Euro6_v1_0
ddt:Target.Description:
Status : base diag X62 Euro6 / VI Date : Frebruary 2014 Base DDT Version: 1_00 Auteur / pilote : A. FUSEE (57802)
v1.00 - Creation from x61ph2 / x62 DDT base (A. FUSEE ,Assystem) ========================================================= - Adding of SW v01.00 in auto-ident - Adding of CFG_TYPE_SCR

Data.Name: K maj S1
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: Possible value of k when L1 is above SEUIL_H is defined in a table

Data.Name: K maj S1_GPL
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: KMAJS1 for LPG (Liquefied Petroleum Gaz)

Data.Name: K maj S2
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre:Possible value of k when L1 is between SEUIL_H and SEUIL_B is defined in a table

Data.Name: K maj S2_GPL
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: KMAJS2 for LPG

Data.Name: K min S1
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: Possible value of k when L1 is above SEUIL_H is defined in a table

Data.Name: K min S1_GPL
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: KMINS1 for LPG

Data.Name: K min S2
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: Possible value of k when L1 is between SEUIL_H and SEUIL_B.

Data.Name: K min S2_GPL
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: KMINS2 for LPG

Data.Name: L0
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: Raw data of fuel volume

Data.Name: L1
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: Filtered value of L0

Data.Name: L2
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: Information of volume in the tank

Data.Name: RecalageL0_L3
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: Minimum difference between L3 at last APC off + 12s and L0 at APC on

Data.Name: RecalageL0GPL_L3GPL
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: RECALL0_L3 for LPG

Data.Name: RecalageL2_EnAPC
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: Minimum difference between L0 +12s after zero speed and L0 while zero speed

Data.Name: RecalageL2GPL_EnAPC
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: RECALL2_APC for LPG

Data.Name: RecalageL2GPLoff_L0GPL
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: Recalage L2off_L0 for LPG

Data.Name: RecalageL2off_L0
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: Refueling parametre: Minimum difference between L2 at last APC turned off and L

Item.Text: Control in Plant or or After-sales diagnostic
Control of the dials not requested

Data.Name: Vdiesel_0
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: volume for gazole engine

Data.Name: Vessence_0
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: volume for petrol engine

Data.Name: Output Control Command
Data.Comment: Testing output : Command enumeration

Data.Name: Output Control Status
Data.Comment: Testing output : Status

Data.Name: Output Permanent Control List
Data.Comment: Buzzer permanent control (side light warning type)

Item.Text: Lighting selected segment LCD TPMS/Auto Gearbox
Lighting display for Bottom/Mid/Top range cluster
Positioning of the REV COUNTER dial
Positioning of the WATER TEMPERATURE dial
Ctrl of backlighting of displays, graphs and dials
Ctrl all the internal cluster indicators
Ctrl all segments of auto/robo Gearbox, TPMS
Invalid airbag data for 60 consecutive seconds

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: VAlerteBackUp
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: alert volume BackUp

Data.Name: TAU
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: Period of filtering of L1

Data.Name: Type of ADAC display
Data.Comment: ADAC: AiDe A la Conduite - Trip computer

Data.Name: Vehicle type
Data.Comment: Vehicle type

Data.Name: Threshold B
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: Low threshold.

Data.Name: Threshold B_GPL
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: Low threshold for LPG

Data.Name: Threshold H
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: High threshold

Data.Name: Threshold H_GPL
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: High threshold for LPG

Data.Name: Threshold BackUp
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: Backup threshold.

Data.Name: Threshold RecalL0Plein
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: Minimum value of L0 at APC turned ON

Data.Name: Threshold RecalL2Plein
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: Minimum value of L0 at APC turned OFF

Data.Name: U oil level value
Data.Comment: U2-U1

Data.Name: CalibrationNumber
Data.Comment: Calibration number (Hex)

Data.Name: DiagnosticIdentificationCode
Data.Comment: Diag evolution number

Data.Name: SoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: Software identification number

Data.Name: RecalageL0L3Plein
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: Minimum difference between L3 and L0 at APC turned ON

Data.Name: Presence of ADAC function
Data.Comment: ADAC: AiDe A la Conduite - Trip computer

Item.Text: W. ADAC WO. reseting FuelConsumption. For Poste

Data.Name: Presence of PLCM
Data.Comment: sliding door configuration

Data.Name: Perform oil change pre-alert threshold
Data.Comment: oil change pre-alert threshold (Val * 100)

Data.Name: Rev counter dial motor command in hundreds of revs.
Speed dial motor command in Kph.
Status of the battery discharge warning requested by the BCM
State of the parameter AT-Faults/States_84
Data.Comment: State of the parameter AT-Faults/States_84 = 0110 or == 0111

Data.Name: RESERVED (FAP+ SERVICE)
Data.Comment: FAP: Particulate Filter

Data.Name: State of the speed regulator/limiter parameter CruiseControlStatusDisplay = 011 or 110
Rheostat voltage value
Data.Comment: Rheostat Rheostat voltage MSB value

Data.Name: Speed regulator memorization
Data.Comment: Speed regulator memorization, Status of parameter CruiseontrolStatusDysplay = 011 or 110 memorized

Data.Name: Passenger airbag indicator internal diagnostics memorization
Data.Comment: Passenger airbag indicator internal diagnostics memorization (when PassAirbag_OfflampOpérationnel _8

Data.Name: Presence of Warning water temp
Data.Comment: WWT telltale (de)activation

Data.Name: R0_max
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: Gauge resistance value

Data.Name: SupplierNumber.ITG
Data.Comment: Supplier ITG code

Data.Name: EditionNumber
Data.Comment: Software version (edition) number

Data.Name: Oil pressure switch contract status
Data.Comment: Oil pressure switch contract status

Data.Name: Oil change autonomy parameter (Month max nb.)

Item.Text: the display corresponds to the last value measured
the display corresponds to the memorized value
Measurement impossible du to Short Circuit
Measurement impossible since probe in Open Circuit

Data.Name: Memorization of the battery discharge warning requested by the BCM
Min oil/SERVICE memorization
Data.Comment: Min oil/SERVICE memorization (when 440< Nhu)

Data.Name: OBD/SERVICE memorization
Data.Comment: OBD/SERVICE memorization (when MilLampState has occurred = 01)

Data.Name: Parking brake/EBD memorization
Data.Comment: Parking brake/EBD memorization (when parking brake Status input has been connected to ground and the

Data.Name: Oil pressure/STOP memorization
Data.Comment: Oil pressure/STOP memorization (OilPressureSwitch = 1 and engine speed > 1,600rpm)

Data.Name: Min. fuel indicator
Data.Comment: Min. fuel indicator (when the lighting is due to LBackUp resetting)

Data.Name: Min. fuel memorization
Data.Comment: Min. fuel memorization (lighting is due to LBackUp resetting)

Data.Name: Number of resets caused by failures
Oil pressure warning threshold
Data.Comment: Oil pressure warning threshold (Val x 100rpm)

Data.Name: Min. oil/SERVICE indicator
Data.Comment: Min. oil/SERVICE indicator ( when 440< Nhu)

Data.Name: Oil pressure/STOP indicator
Data.Comment: when OilPressureSwitch = 1 and engine speed > 1600rpm

Data.Name: OBD/SERVICE indicator
Data.Comment: when MilLampState = 01

Data.Name: Oil pressure fault detection. CAN
Data.Comment: Oil pressure fault detection (CAN)

Item.Text: cond met contact closed & eng speed > threshold

Data.Name: LBackUp
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: Filtered value of L0. Only used for a back up warning..

Data.Name: Byte number
Data.Comment: Nomber of bytes

Data.Name: +Side light (CAN)
Data.Comment: +Side light (CAN)

Data.Name: Driver seat belt contact (CAN)
Data.Comment: Driver seat belt contact (CAN)

Data.Name: Alternator, battery charge information status (CAN)
Data.Comment: Alternator, battery charge information status (CAN)

Data.Name: Engine speed (threshold = 400rpm)
Data.Comment: Engine speed (threshold = 400rpm)

Data.Name: External seat belt indicator
Data.Comment: External seat belt indicator

Data.Name: +APC (CAN)
Data.Comment: Ignition transition ON

Data.Name: Driver door contact (CAN)
Data.Comment: Contact porte conducteur

Data.Name: Low beam (CAN)
Data.Comment: Low beam (CAN)

Data.Name: FR fog lamps (CAN)
Data.Comment: Front Fog Lamp (CAN)

Data.Name: External temperature (CAN)
Data.Comment: External temperature (CAN)

Data.Name: Engine speed (rpm) CAN
Data.Comment: Engine speed (rpm) CAN

Data.Name: Engine temperature data (°C) CAN
Data.Comment: Engine temperature data (°C) CAN

Data.Name: Consumed fuel data (mm3) CAN
Data.Comment: Consumed fuel data (mm3) CAN

Data.Name: DTC Loss of communication frame with brake system control module
DTC Oil level sensor Open Circuit
DTC Oil level sensor short circuit
DTC Oil level sensor voltage outside range
DTC Fuel gauge voltage outside range
DTC Passenger airbag indicator open circuit
DTC VBATT power supply voltage below min. limit
DTC VBATT power supply voltage above max. limit
DTC "Displayed speed" CAN parameter signal invalid
DTC Loss of communication frame with ECM
DTC Loss of communication frame with AT
DTC Loss of communication frame with USM
DTC Loss of EPS ECU frame
DTC Loss of airbag module frame
DTC Airbag info signal invalid for 60 consecutive secs
DTC Passenger airbag fault indicator short circuit
Duration of exterior temperature decrease monitoring
Driver seat belt warning buzzer inhibition

Item.Text: WO ext temp display. by default
with display of the exterior temperature

Data.Name: LHD or RHD type
Data.Comment: Driving type (Left-Hand Drive or Right-Hand Drive)

Data.Name: Forward motion law on speed regulator/limiter

Item.Text: Forward motion law not applied with fixed parameter (Just for X62 cluster_Mile version)
Forward motion law applied with fixed parameter (Just for X62 cluster_Mile version)

Data.Name: ADAC Lower stalk switch button
Data.Comment: ADAC/ODO movement button (CAN) - Lower stalk switch button

Data.Name: ADAC Upper stalk switch button
Data.Comment: ADAC/ODO movement button (CAN) - Upper stalk switch button

Data.Name: Cause of the last GNC gauge resetting

Item.Text: L2 LPG initialized in APC ON
L2 LPG initialized by resetting L2GPLoff
L2 LPG initialized by resetting L3GPL
L2 LPG initialized by a diagnostics order
L2 LPG initialized following degraded mode output
L2 LPG is in degraded mode

Data.Name: Cause of last gasoline or diesel gauge resetting

Item.Text: L2 initialized by a diagnostics order
L2 initialized following a gauge fault
L2 is in injection frame absence
L2 has been initialized by Flag_Memo
L2 initialized by a full tank resetting then

Data.Name: Fuel dial motor command in litres
Backlight lighting and dials command + ADAC display with all segments lit

Item.Text: FRONT FOG LAMP indicator ctrl command
PASSENGER AIRBAG OFF indicator ctrl command
REAR FOG LAMP indicator ctrl command
DRIVER SEAT BELT indicator ctrl command
TdB EdG_WATER TEMPERATURE indicator ctrl command
TdB EdG_OPENING PANEL indicator ctrl command_RED
1st severity EPS FAULT indicator ctrl command_RED
TdB MdG_OPENING PANEL indicator ctrl command (RED)
Free Shift Up indicator ctrl command
Free Shift Down indicator ctrl command
STOP and START S indicator ctrl command
STOP and START Unavalibile indicator ctrl command

Data.Name: Distance travelled after oil change warning in Km
Data.Comment: Distance travelled after oil change warning in Km

Data.Name: Gasoline or diesel distance travelled
Data.Comment: Gasoline or diesel distance travelled on onboard computer (1 lsb = 10cm)
Data.Description: Donnée déclarée signée, pour pouvoir être affichée en mètres, car DDT ne sait pas gérer une donnée numérique de 32bits non signée.

Data.Name: DV_0 (= alert)
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: pointer deviation

Data.Name: DVGPL_1(alert)
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: pointer deviation for LPG

Data.Name: ABS/SERVICE memorization
Data.Comment: ABS/SERVICE memorization (when ABSStateLamp has occurred= 01)

Data.Name: AIRBAG/SERVICE memorization
Data.Comment: AIRBAG/SERVICE memorization (when lighting of the SERVICE indicator link to lighting of Airbag indic

Data.Name: ALS/SERVICE indicator memorization
Data.Comment: ALS/SERVICE indicator memorization (BCM_SytemControl_ALSMalfunction = 1)

Data.Name: AUTOMATIC GEARBOX/SERVICE memorization
Data.Comment: AUTOMATIC GEARBOX/SERVICE memorization AT-Faults/States_84 = status memorized 0110 or == 0111

Data.Name: EPS/SERVICE memorization
Data.Comment: EPS/SERVICE memorization (when EPSteeringFailure has occurred = 01)

Data.Name: ESP/SERVICE memorization
Data.Comment: ESP/SERVICE memorization (when ESPStateLamp= 001 or 101 has occurred)

Data.Name: ADAC time (1LSB = 1 second)
Data.Comment: ADAC: AiDe A la Conduite - Trip computer.

Data.Name: Duration of exterior temperature increase monitoring
Airbag indicator internal diagnostics memorization
Data.Comment: Airbag indicator internal diagnostics memorization (when AirbagMalfunctionLampOpérationnel has occur

Data.Name: CAN/STOP memorization (Bus off)
Data.Comment: CAN/STOP memorization (Bus off)

Data.Name: Battery charge/STOP memorization
Data.Comment: Battery charge/STOP memorization (when BatteryLamp = 1 and engine speed > 400rpm)

Data.Name: EPS/STOP memorization
Data.Comment: EPS/STOP memorization (there has been an EPSSteeringFailure = 10)

Data.Name: Airbag info Validity memorization
Data.Comment: Airbag info Validity memorization (When ValidAirbagInformation has occurred_84= 0)

Item.Text: No memorization of the non validity

Data.Name: General odometer in Km
Data.Comment: General odometer in Km - Max. value is 16,777,215km

Data.Name: ABS/SERVICE indicator
Data.Comment: ABS/SERVICE indicator ( when ABSStateLamp= 01)

Data.Name: ALS/SERVICE indicator
Data.Comment: ALS/SERVICE indicator (BCM_SytemControl_ALSMalfunction = 1)

Data.Name: Injection indicator
Data.Comment: (Injection failure 1 severity EngineControlFailureLevel2_84 = 1)

Data.Name: High beam_CAN
Data.Comment: High beam (CAN)

Data.Name: In calibration EBD_memorization
Data.Comment: In calibration EBD/memorization (when the EBVStateLamp parameter has occurred = 11)

Data.Name: In calibration_EBD indicator
Data.Comment: (when EBVStateLamp parameter = 11)

Data.Name: Injection_SERVICE indicator
Data.Comment: Injection/SERVICE indicator ( when EngineControlFailureLevel1_84= 1)

Data.Name: Injection_STOP memorization
Data.Comment: Injection/STOP memorization (if there has been an Injection failure 1 severity EngineControlFailureL

Data.Name: Gauging degraded mode: absence of fuel stored data_CAN
Gauging degraded mode: absence of fuel data_CAN
Ignition command alphanum display seg _ADAC seg

Item.Text: Ignition none seg auto_robo gearbox TPMS
Ignition all seg auto_robo gearbox TPMS

Data.Name: L0i
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: Value of L0 at initialization of zero speed readjustment.

Data.Name: L0c
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: Current value of L0 during zero speed readjustment

Data.Name: Water temperature: Absence of CAN data
Data.Comment: Water temperature: Absence of data (CAN)

Data.Name: Water in the Diesel filter + SERVICE indicator
Water temperature dial motor command in celsius
Water in diesel filter+SERVICE indicator memorization

Item.Text: With tachometer without general odometer page
With tachometer with general odometer page

Data.Name: Vehicle speed_kph
Data.Comment: Vehicle speed (kph) (CAN)

Data.Name: Vehicle speed_threshold = 15kph
Data.Comment: Vehicle speed (threshold = 15kph)

Data.Name: Tank capacity_in litres
Data.Comment: Tank capacity (in litres)(gasoline or diesel)

Data.Name: Driver exit detection Config buzzer_under StopAuto
Data.Comment: Buzzer configuration for driver exit detection (under Stop auto)

Data.Name: Battery charge_STOP indicator
Data.Comment: (when BatteryLamp = 1 and engine speed > 400rpm)

Data.Name: Brake fluid_STOP indicator
Data.Comment: (when Nivocod wire input is connected to ground)

Data.Name: EPS_STOP Indicator
Data.Comment: (when EPSSteeringFailure = 10)

Data.Name: Engine water temperature_STOP indicator
Data.Comment: when WarningWaterTemp = 1 and engine speed >= 400rpm for 20

Data.Name: CAN_SERVICE indicator
Data.Comment: CAN/SERVICE indicator (absence of frame)

Data.Name: AIRBAG_SERVICE indicator_Driver and passanger
Data.Comment: when lighting of the SERVICE indicator link to lighting of Airbag indicator

Data.Name: Engine water temperature_STOP memorization
Data.Comment: Engine water temperature/STOP memorization (when WarningWaterTemp = 1 and engine speed >= 400rpm for

Data.Name: Brake fluid_STOP memorization
Data.Comment: Brake fluid/STOP memorization (Nivocod wire input has been connected to ground)

Data.Name: Unit of distance for ADAC
Data.Comment: ADAC: AiDe A la Conduite - Trip computer

Data.Name: TPMS opening panels Automatic or Robotized GearBox
Data.Comment: TPMS opening panels Automatic/Robotized GearBox (Top of range) DISPLAY

Item.Text: FR RH WHEEL CONTOUR segment lighting command
FR RH DOOR segment lighting command
Command of segments forming the D ( positive)
Ignition command seg. 3 of DIGIT 7 segments
Ignition command seg. 2 of DIGIT 7 segments
FR LH DOOR segment lighting command
FR LH WHEEL CONTOUR segment lighting command
FR RH WHEEL INTERIOR segment lighting command
RR RH DOOR segment lighting command
Command of segments forming the P (positive)
Ignition command seg. 4 of DIGIT 7 segments
Ignition command seg. 6 of DIGIT 7 segments
RR LH DOOR segment lighting command
FR LH WHEEL INTERIOR segment lighting command
RR RH WHEEL CONTOUR segment lighting command
Command of segments forming the R (Positive)
Ignition command seg. 5 of DIGIT 7 segments
Ignition command seg. 1 of DIGIT 7 segments
RR LH WHEEL CONTOUR segment lighting command
RR RH WHEEL INTERIOR segment lighting command
Command of segments forming the N (Positif)
Ignition command seg. 0 of DIGIT 7 segments
RR LH WHEEL INTERIOR segment lighting command
FOOT ON BRAKE segment lighting command

Data.Name: TUP_SERVICE memorization
Data.Comment: TUP/SERVICE memorization (when BrakePadWear = 01 or 10 or 11 has occurred)

Data.Name: TUP_SERVICE indicator
Data.Comment: (when BrakePadWear = 01 or 10 or 11)

Data.Name: TPMS_STOP indicator
Data.Comment: When XYWheelState = 101

Data.Name: TPMS_STOP memorization
Data.Comment: When XYWheelState = 101

Data.Name: TPMS_SERVICE memorization
Data.Comment: Recopy of bit SERVICE/CAN by absence of the frame MMI_TPMS_CANHS_R_01

Data.Name: TPMS_SERVICE indicator
Data.Comment: Recopy of bit SERVICE/CAN by absence of the frame MMI_TPMS_CANHS_R_01

Data.Name: Passenger seat belt contact_by CAN
Data.Comment: Passenger seat belt contact (CAN)

Data.Name: Passenger present_by CAN
Data.Comment: Passenger present (CAN)

Data.Name: RR fog lamps_by CAN
Data.Comment: Rear fog lamp (CAN)

Data.Name: Speed regulator and limiter requirement
Data.Comment: Cruise Control (CC) and Speed Limiter (SL) configuration

Data.Name: Null speed recal tempo_seconds
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: Zero Speed Readjustment temporisation

Data.Name: Null speed recal threshold
Data.Comment: Refueling parametre: Zero Speed Readjustment threshold

Item.Text: With VSU (without ABS and without ESC)

Data.Name: Perform oil change_SERVICE memorization
Data.Comment: when the warning threshold has been reached

Data.Name: Perform oil change_SERVICE indicator
Data.Comment: when the warning threshold has been reached

Data.Name: Presence SS + SS unavailability + Automatic restart assist
Data.Comment: S&S: Stop and Start

Data.Name: EBV_STOP indicator
Data.Comment: Brake incident when EBVStateLamp parameter is received = 01

Data.Name: EBV_STOP memorization
Data.Comment: EBD/STOP memorization (brake incident when EBVStateLamp parameter is received = 01)
